content: Download and place MediNova assets (logo, hero image)
Update landing.html - full MediNova theme (blue gradient, hero, benefits, about, FAQ, testimonials, contact, footer)
Update LandingPage.js meta tags - MediNova branding
Update App.css - color scheme from lime/navy to blue gradient
Update index.css CSS variables - primary from lime to blue
Update tailwind.config.js - remap lime palette to blue
Update Layout.js - sidebar MediNova logo and branding
Update LoginPage.js - MediNova logo and blue accents
Update index.html - MediNova page title and SEO meta
Update all DME PROS text references to MediNova across components
Update PublicBrandLogo.jsx fallback to MediNova logo
